creator: seb@erix.ericsson.se
text:
A new release of Erlang has been made (the old distfiles are not
  kept around at the master site, www.erlang.org, so an update of the
  port is necessary). Other things changed:

  - I have changed maintainer to myself after checking with the
    current maintainer (ruslan@shevchenko.kiev.ua). I will make sure
    to keep the port in shape when we make new releases, also I plan
    to commit ports for the two add on packages available for Erlang.

  - I have added more mirror sites, however they are all in Sweden. If
    we could add the distfile to LOCAL_PORTS it would be great.

  The recursive unidiffs came out to about 30KB, so I have included
  them as a gzipped and uuencoded file.
